service-settlement.title: Property Service Settlement
service-settlement.subtitle: Interactive form
service-settlement.enter-utility-costs: Please enter the water and heating costs in the fields below.
service-settlement.enter-utility-costs-d: Copy the amounts from the annual settlement provided by your building manager or property management company. If some items are not included in the settlement, simply leave the fields empty.
service-settlement.enter-expenses-descri: Please enter the remaining costs from the settlement provided by your building manager. Only include the costs that are transferred to the tenant.
service-settlement.enter-expenses-link: See which costs can be transferred to the tenant.
